$comment: Phase 1 payment map for Kazakhstan (run-kz-2026-07-14). Country-level context only — per-exchange KZT support must come from per-exchange evidence, never inferred from this map (kz-t07/kz-t09 pending).

major_banks.name: Kaspi Bank
major_banks.role: Dominant retail payments super-app; most common P2P transfer rail

major_banks.name: Halyk Bank
major_banks.role: Largest bank; the launch rail of Bybit Kazakhstan's regulated P2P (verified Tier B)

p2p_relevance: High — KZT on-ramp is predominantly P2P via local bank transfer; presence/liquidity of KZT P2P with Kaspi/Halyk methods is the key user-fit signal for exchange ranking.
regulated_p2p_note: Only verified regulated KZT P2P among candidates: Bybit Kazakhstan (Halyk-only at Nov 2025 launch; 2.5M KZT/tx, 5M KZT/day).
